allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; row=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[0]; [print\(k,'=',repr\(v\)\) for k,v in row.items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; rows=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(rows\)} rows'\); [print\(json.dumps\(r, indent=2\)\) for r in rows]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; rows=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(rows\)} rows with data'\); [print\(json.dumps\(r, indent=2\)\) for r in rows]")
